text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training time comes around, but I don't see
Narita Taishin, so I decide to go looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah! That was an easy win! The arcade and
mobile versions of this game are practically the
same.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Aww yeah! I'm on fire! Just gotta keep this streak
going!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Who the heck is this "MightyMe" anyways?
They're relentless!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We're pretty evenly matched, so why do I keep
losing? Dammit! I'm winning the next round if it
kills me!
choice_data_list: Um, Taishin... You coming to training?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She apologizes, and I tell her to be more careful
from now on.
